---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload file '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

**Operating System:**
- [ ] Windows 10/11
- [ ] macOS 12+
- [ ] Linux (Ubuntu 20.04+)
- [ ] Other:

**Python Version:** (e.g., 3.11.5)
```
python --version
```

**Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 115)

**Installation Method:**
- [ ] Python/pip installation
- [ ] Pre-built executable
- [ ] Built from source

## Log Output

Please include relevant log output from `logs/license_uploader.log`:

```
[paste log output here]
```

## Configuration

**File being processed:** (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT, size)

**API Configuration:** (DO NOT include actual API keys)
- LiteLLM Model:
- Alma API Region:

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing issues
- [ ] I have reviewed the [Troubleshooting Guide](../../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] I am using the latest version
- [ ] I have included relevant log output
- [ ] I have removed any sensitive information (API keys, credentials)
